text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that allows computers to interpret and understand visual information from the world. It involves tasks such as image recognition, which identifies objects or people in photos, and object detection, which locates specific items within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, self-driving cars use computer vision to detect pedestrians, road signs, and other vehicles to navigate safely. In healthcare, it helps doctors analyse medical scans. This technology is also found in smartphone cameras, security systems, and retail, making our daily lives more efficient and secure.
